statement: In every magma, Equation 3368 (`x * y = y * (z * (y * z))`) implies Equation 3563 (`x * y = y * ((y * z) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0032
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op y (op z (op y z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op y z) z))
